Go Premium AI

Smart Copilot

Hello! I'm your AI Workspace Assistant. How can I help you optimize your business today? I can write copy, generate images, or analyze your sales data.

Can you draft a welcome email for my new "Pro Plan" members? Include a discount for their next month.

Draft: Welcome to the Pro Family! 🚀

Dear [Name],

We're thrilled to have you on board! You've just unlocked advanced tools to scale your business. As a special thank you, use code **PROGROWTH** for 20% off your next renewal.

Best,
MyManager Team

​
